title: Blackberry Knit
description: A whole30-friendly, garlic-infused dish that combines the tangy sweetness of blackberries with a savory, dense texture reminiscent of a hearty Italian meal, perfect for a monsoon evening.

ingredients.name: 1 cup heavy cream
ingredients.notes: ensure it's unsweetened and free of additives

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup grated parmesan cheese
ingredients.notes: optional, use low sodium if available

ingredients.name: 1 teaspoon dried oregano
ingredients.notes: fresh is preferred but not essential

instructions: Place blackberries in a blender or food processor with heavy cream, minced garlic, olive oil, parmesan cheese, dried oregano, salt, and pepper. Blend until smooth.
Pour mixture into an oven-safe dish. Bake for about 20-25 minutes or until thickened and slightly golden on top.
Serve hot as a side dish with grilled meats or as a spreadable topping over whole grain bread.
